sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79428" key="parechge/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρεξ-ηγέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n79428.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">misinterpret</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸν Ἀριστοτέλην</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:378:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cael.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">378.29</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
